chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-748 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.1693/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.1694/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2025 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Asghar Ali SHO PS Jhangro District Tharparkar @ Mithi. Mr. Anb Meghwar advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.8 taken on record. Alleged detainee Mst. Baby present in person along with respondent No.8. The alleged detainee, namely Mst. Baby, present before the Court, states that she is about 18 years of age and being sui juris has contracted marriage with Vinod (respondent No.8) of her own free will, without any pressure, coercion or undue influence. She further states that she intends to go and reside with her husband Vinod. The alleged detainee also states that the present petition has been filed by the petitioner with mala fide intentions and that she does not support the contents and averments made therein. Since the alleged detainee is sui juris, has contracted marriage of her own free will with respondent No.8, and has categorically expressed her intention to go and live with her husband, she is hereby set at liberty to do so. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
